candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus reports conv>=90% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as UNVALIDATED and cap size at 0.5x until historical confirmation accrues.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A 100% conviction reading with zero historical green_matches means the live indicator stack has never resolved this exact configuration into a profitable outcome — the conviction reflects present-bar agreement, not a distribution of realized edge. Institutionally, a fully one-sided indicator vote (AUDNZD 18/30 bear, conv=100%) is where crowded positioning peaks and mean-reversion risk is highest; without a historical hit-rate anchor the conviction is regime-fragile, not edge-confirmed.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier *= 0.5
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Reduces variance drag from unvalidated max-conviction entries; expected Sharpe +0.02-0.03 by trimming the fat left tail of crowded-signal reversals without cutting validated setups.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: AUDNZD shows conv=100% (18/30 bear) yet green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%; USDJPY conv=67% and GBPUSD conv=58% likewise all report hist_hr=0% — every current directional call lacks any historical hit-rate backing, so acting on raw conviction is unsupported.

retirement_flag.reason: VIX gate was tightened to 13 on a 'bull market' premise; current backdrop shows ROTATION_WARN, VIX rising 15.67->16.73, and 10Y-2Y flattening 0.41->0.37 — the safe-haven-corruption assumption may be shifting toward a genuine risk-off regime where the 13 gate is now too permissive rather than too tight.
retirement_flag.system_health_note: 0 trades in the last 7 days with UNKNOWN regime and all directional consensus calls at hist_hr=0% — the system is data-starved and CALIBRATING, so any lesson must be validated on fresh paper trades before sizing on it.

reflection.system_health_note: Regime is UNKNOWN with internal/TV agreement forcing 75% sizing and zero closed trades this week — the pipeline is accumulating but not yet emitting validated signals, so favor caution gates over new alpha bets.
